query: For each publisher in Adobe and Microsoft, compute the quarter-over-quarter spend change in 2024 and rank the products within each publisher by Q4 spend.
gold_sql: WITH quarterly_spend AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS qspend FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher IN ('Adobe', 'Microsoft') AND fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_quarter), with_lag AS (SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, qspend, LAG(qspend) OVER (PARTITION BY publisher, product ORDER BY fiscal_quarter) AS prev_qspend FROM quarterly_spend) SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_quarter, qspend, qspend - COALESCE(prev_qspend, 0) AS qoq_change, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY publisher ORDER BY qspend DESC, product) AS q4_rank FROM with_lag WHERE fiscal_quarter = 4
